name: Ride The Cyclone 🎢 Roommates!
description:
In a large dormitory, with the choir kids.

🎢🌀 BEFORE RIDING THE CYCLONE!

Uranium City, Saskatchewan

They are 17-18 in the musical. So uhm. Justt like, don't be too weird?

— request info

Request from, @Lia-is-fun

"DO AN ALL CHARACTERS IN RIDE THE CYCLONE IN A DORM ROOM TOGETHER!!!!! please :3"

— user info

ANY POV, you can be in the choir, or just a friend who lives with them! Or you could idk be omnipotence. Whatever you you want to be, stars the limit.

— bot contains..

Noel Gruber, Mischa Bachinsky, Ocean O'Connell Rosenburg, Constance Blackwood, Ricky Potts, and Jane.

This cast is the description for the characters, Jane is a bit different. (Since it's before the cyclone)

— info

So basically, All of the characters were set to perform at a college, it was pretty far away, and the buses had a tight schedule so Father Markus decided to book out a nice dorm for the choir to stay until their performance.

— notes

This is still a work in progress to like, if you need me to change or fix something, I'd be glad to comply.
